situation: audit-cycle-state status=cycle-complete after skills/runner-exec fixes all merged. Triggered new full deep audit on unaudited project engine-skills-extracted, module 分诊流水线 (pipeline-gate.py + triage.py). Project is extracted skill archive containing security-critical TCB code that gates all Edit/Write/Bash operations.
action: Deep-read pipeline-gate.py (167 lines), triage.py (136 lines), SKILL.md. Traced data flow from user input → subprocess calls → file writes. Identified 6 findings: 2 high (shell injection via shell=True+f-string in _diff_scale; path traversal in history archive via unsanitized kind field), 3 medium (silent exception swallowing in security gate; race condition in history numbering; stage regression crash on corrupt state), 1 low (SKILL.md claims .claude/ exemption but code doesn't implement it). Wrote audit report audit-2026-07-02-004.md with full remediation sketches. Updated audit-cycle-state to fix-in-progress with 6 pending derived_fixes.
outcome_evidence: Audit report written at .claude/audits/audit-2026-07-02-004.md with 6 findings (2H/3M/1L). audit-cycle-state.json updated: status=fix-in-progress, pending_count=6, current_audit_id=audit-2026-07-02-004, history entry appended. No code changes this round (audit-only per protocol).
next_suggestion: Next round: derive first fix case for ESE-TP-001 (shell injection in pipeline-gate.py _diff_scale, replace shell=True+f-string with list args). Then sequentially ESE-TP-002 through ESE-TP-006. All are route-fix scope, target engine-skills-extracted/分诊流水线/scripts/. After all 6 merged/rejected, cycle-complete triggers next deep audit.

audit_findings.finding: Shell injection via unsanitized root path interpolated into shell=True subprocess command in _diff_scale()
audit_findings.remediation: Replace shell=True + f-string with subprocess.run(['git', '-C', str(root), 'diff', '--cached', '--numstat'], shell=False)

audit_findings.finding: Path traversal in history archive: d.get('kind') used unsanitized in filename construction, allows directory traversal if current.json manually edited
audit_findings.remediation: Sanitize kind value: re.sub(r'[^a-z]', '', d.get('kind','x')) or validate against allowed set before path construction

audit_findings.finding: Silent exception swallowing in security gate (_load_current, _diff_scale, Stop handler) — failures open the gate instead of failing closed
audit_findings.remediation: Distinguish file-missing (OK) from corruption (warn/block); log git failures; catch specific exceptions in Stop handler

audit_findings.finding: TOCTOU race condition in history numbering: glob count + write not atomic, concurrent invocations can overwrite each other's archives
audit_findings.remediation: Use timestamp-based unique filenames or O_EXCL atomic create pattern

audit_findings.finding: Stage regression check crashes with ValueError if stored stage not in STAGES enum (corrupt current.json)
audit_findings.remediation: Validate d['stage'] in STAGES before .index() lookup; handle invalid values gracefully

audit_findings.finding: SKILL.md documents .claude/ exemption but _is_doc_or_meta() doesn't implement it — editing .claude/settings.json incorrectly triggers gate
audit_findings.remediation: Add '.claude' prefix check in _is_doc_or_meta(): rel == '.claude' or rel.startswith('.claude' + os.sep)
